Mastercrafted handout catalog

Click a copy button to put a single /summonitem command on your clipboard, then paste into the EQ2 chat. Use the search box to filter by name.

Other useful GM commands: /giveitem <player> <id> to hand to another player · /summonitem <id> 1 bank to bank instead of bag · /player coins add plat 100 for coin.
